name: whisper-transcribe
description: Transcribe meeting/audio recordings via a whisper.cpp server (local, LAN, or tailnet) and write a concise summary, optionally sharpened with caller-supplied context (files or inline --context-text). Asks for the server URL on first use — no hardcoded host. Ships /transcribe <recording> [--prompt "vocab"] [--lang xx] [--context-text "..."] [context.md ...].
